description: At the Malick estate, Malick, Stephanie, and Hive (the Hydra god) welcome the Hydra inner circle. Hive reveals his true nature, addressing the group as Ward and hinting at his cosmic history. Malick's fears intensify as he realizes his own position is becoming precarious.

transcript.line: Dad, you okay? The others are anxious to know why they're here, and I don't know if I can keep the secret much longer.
